extraction.text: CHILD PHYSICAL EXAMINATION,VITAL SIGNS:  Birth weight is ** grams, length **, occipitofrontal circumference **.  Character of cry was lusty.,GENERAL APPEARANCE:  Well.,BREATHING:  Unlabored.,SKIN:  Clear.  No cyanosis, pallor, or icterus.  Subcutaneous tissue is ample.,HEAD:  Normal.  Fontanelles are soft and flat.  Sutures are opposed.,EYES:  Normal with red reflex x2.,EARS:  Patent.  Normal pinnae, canals, TMs.,NOSE:  Patent nares.,MOUTH:  No cleft.,THROAT:  Clear.,NECK:  No masses.,CHEST:  Normal clavicles.,LUNGS:  Clear bilaterally.,HEART:  Regular rate and rhythm without murmur.,ABDOMEN:  Soft, flat.  No hepatosplenomegaly.  The cord is three vessel.,GENITALIA:  Normal ** genitalia **with testes descended bilaterally.,ANUS:  Patent.,SPINE:  Straight and without deformity.,EXTREMITIES:  Equal movements.,MUSCLE TONE:  Good.,REFLEXES:  Moro, grasp, and suck are normal.,HIPS:  No click or clunk.
